channel.title: AI News — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Daily AI news digest — curated headlines, summaries and trends

item.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
item.description: Google has launched new AI-driven features in Workspace, enhancing productivity by automating various tasks. This update aims to position Workspace as a more efficient tool for users.

item.title: Another npm supply chain worm is tearing through dev environments
item.description: A new npm supply chain attack is spreading through developer environments, compromising packages and stealing sensitive data. This incident highlights ongoing vulnerabilities in open-source software.

item.title: Hands on with X’s new AI-powered custom feeds
item.description: X has introduced AI-powered custom feeds that replace its Communities feature, offering Grok-curated content and new advertising opportunities. This change aims to enhance user engagement on the platform.

item.title: Sam Altman’s Orb Company Promoted a Bruno Mars Partnership That Doesn't Exist
item.description: Sam Altman's Orb Company falsely claimed a partnership with Bruno Mars, which the artist's spokesperson denied. This incident raises questions about the company's credibility.

item.title: Anthropic's super-scary bug hunting model Mythos is shaping up to be a nothingburger
item.description: Anthropic's Mythos model, designed for bug hunting, is feared to be too powerful for public release, but early evaluations suggest it may not be as effective as claimed.

item.title: Cost-effective multilingual audio transcription at scale with Parakeet-TDT and AWS Batch
item.description: A new scalable transcription pipeline using Parakeet-TDT and AWS Batch is detailed, showcasing cost-effective multilingual audio processing solutions. This can significantly improve transcription efficiency.

item.title: SK Hynix’s aspirations for ’Merica-made HBM inch closer to reality
item.description: SK Hynix has begun construction on a facility in Indiana to manufacture high-bandwidth memory (HBM), crucial for AI accelerators, aligning with Nvidia's upcoming GPU needs.

item.title: OpenAI now lets you screenshot your privacy in the foot
item.description: OpenAI has introduced a feature allowing users to monitor their model's privacy settings, emphasizing the importance of self-surveillance in AI interactions.

item.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
item.description: SpaceX's acquisition offer of $60 billion led Cursor to halt its $2 billion fundraising efforts, showcasing the competitive landscape in tech funding.

item.title: Bloom Card vs. Brick: My verdict after trying both gadgets to cut screen time
item.description: A comparison between Bloom Card and Brick gadgets for reducing screen time reveals insights into their effectiveness and user experience. The verdict offers guidance for potential buyers.

item.title: Microsoft issues emergency update for macOS and Linux ASP.NET threat
item.description: Microsoft released an emergency update for macOS and Linux due to a serious ASP.NET authentication vulnerability. This update is crucial to prevent potential security breaches.

item.title: Amazon SageMaker AI now supports optimized generative AI inference recommendations
item.description: Amazon SageMaker AI now offers optimized generative AI inference recommendations, allowing developers to focus on model accuracy rather than infrastructure management. This enhancement aims to streamline the deployment process.

item.title: Get to your first working agent in minutes: Announcing new features in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
item.description: Amazon introduced new features in Bedrock AgentCore to simplify the agent building process, reducing infrastructure barriers from prototype to production. This aims to accelerate development timelines.

item.title: The shadowy SIM farms behind those incessant scam texts - and how to stay safe
item.description: The article explores the operations of SIM farms that facilitate large-scale scams and phishing attacks. It provides insights on how these scams work and offers safety tips for potential targets.

item.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
item.description: Google Cloud has launched two new AI chips that are faster and cheaper than their predecessors, aiming to compete with Nvidia. However, Google continues to utilize Nvidia's technology in its cloud services.

item.title: GitHub opts all CLI users into telemetry collection whether they want it or not
item.description: GitHub has automatically opted all CLI users into telemetry collection, raising privacy concerns among users. Instructions to opt-out are provided for those who prefer not to be tracked.

item.title: Don't wait to buy a MacBook Neo for school - here's why
item.description: The MacBook Neo is experiencing high demand, leading to sellouts on Apple's website. This popularity suggests a strong market interest in the new model ahead of the school season.

item.title: The best earbuds of 2026: Expert tested and reviewed
item.description: A review of the best earbuds of 2026 highlights top choices from brands like Apple, Sony, and Bose for various activities. The selection aims to guide consumers in their purchasing decisions.

item.title: 5 AI Models Tried to Scam Me. Some of Them Were Scary Good
item.description: The article discusses the alarming capabilities of AI models in scamming, with some exhibiting surprisingly advanced social skills. Experts express concern over the potential misuse of these technologies.

item.title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
item.description: Google has integrated Gemini-powered 'auto browse' features into Chrome for enterprise users, enabling automation of tasks like research and data entry. This aims to enhance workplace productivity.

item.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
item.description: Google has launched the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, designed specifically for IT and technical users to build agents for enterprise applications. This tool aims to streamline agent management and deployment in businesses.

item.title: New Firefox update patches a whopping 271 bugs with help from Claude Mythos
item.description: The latest Firefox update fixes 271 security vulnerabilities and enhances features like split view and tab sharing, improving user experience and security. Users are encouraged to update immediately.

item.title: Bring your own language model key in VS Code now available
item.description: Visual Studio Code now allows Copilot Business and Enterprise users to utilize their own language model keys, enabling teams to access custom AI models directly within the IDE. This enhances flexibility in AI integration.

item.title: AI failure could trigger the next financial crisis, warns Elizabeth Warren
item.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren warned that AI failures could lead to a financial crisis, drawing parallels to past economic bubbles. She emphasized the need for regulatory oversight in the AI sector.

item.title: OpenAI now lets teams make custom bots that can do work on their own
item.description: OpenAI has introduced cloud-based 'workspace' agents for its Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plans, allowing users to create custom bots that perform various business tasks autonomously.

item.title: Microsoft Discovery: Advancing agentic R&D at scale
item.description: Microsoft Discovery has expanded its preview access, offering new enterprise-grade AI capabilities aimed at enhancing research and development processes for teams. This move signifies a commitment to advancing agentic AI.

item.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
item.description: OpenAI has made ChatGPT for Clinicians available for free to verified healthcare professionals in the U.S., aiding in clinical care, documentation, and research efforts.

item.title: Grafana offers AI assistant for free, warns users not to go mad
item.description: Grafana is offering its AI assistant for free to open source and on-prem users, while cautioning against overuse. This initiative aims to enhance business analytics capabilities.

item.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
item.description: Google has unveiled its eighth generation of TPUs, featuring two specialized chips designed to enhance performance in the evolving agentic AI landscape. This advancement aims to support more complex AI tasks.

item.title: How Google just revamped Gemini Enterprise for the agentic era - here's what's new
item.description: Google has revamped its Gemini Enterprise platform, introducing new features aimed at managing fleets of agents efficiently. This update is part of a broader strategy to support the agentic era in AI.

item.title: C++ code intelligence for GitHub Copilot CLI in public preview
item.description: Microsoft has launched the C++ Language Server in public preview for GitHub Copilot CLI, enhancing code intelligence with IntelliSense capabilities. This development aims to improve the coding experience for developers using C++.

item.title: Introducing Azure Accelerate for Databases: Modernize your data for AI with experts and investments
item.description: Microsoft introduced Azure Accelerate for Databases, a program designed to help organizations modernize their databases for AI integration. This initiative aims to provide expert support and investment for businesses transitioning to AI-ready systems.

item.title: SpaceX Strikes Deal With Coding Startup Cursor For $60 Billion
item.description: SpaceX has announced a potential $60 billion deal with the AI startup Cursor, which could significantly enhance its capabilities in AI-driven coding. This move aligns with SpaceX's strategy to expand its technological edge.

item.title: AI Hallucinations in Filing by a Top Law Firm
item.description: A top law firm has filed a report highlighting the issue of AI hallucinations, emphasizing that such errors could affect any firm. This serves as a cautionary note for legal professionals using AI tools.

item.title: SpaceX strikes $60 billion deal for the right to buy coding startup Cursor
item.description: SpaceX's partnership with Cursor, which could lead to a $60 billion acquisition, aims to strengthen its position in AI development. This strategic move is part of SpaceX's broader initiative to innovate in technology.

item.title: SpaceX Says It Has Agreement to Acquire Cursor for $60 Billion - Bloomberg.com
item.description: SpaceX has reached an agreement to potentially acquire Cursor for $60 billion, allowing for significant collaboration in AI development. This deal could reshape the future of coding technologies.

item.title: zipline-ai 1.8.4
item.description: The Zipline AI platform has released version 1.8.4 of its CLI tool, enhancing its functionality for users. This update aims to improve user experience and performance.

item.title: hypernix 0.31.1
item.description: The HyperNix model has been updated to version 0.31.1, allowing users to download and quantize it for various formats. This update aims to improve model efficiency and accessibility.

item.title: districtapi-mcp added to PyPI
item.description: The districtapi-mcp has been added to PyPI, providing a server for US school district data tailored for AI agents. This addition aims to facilitate data access for educational AI applications.

item.title: Vodafone offers small businesses cybersecurity, AI capability with Google tie-up
item.description: Vodafone has partnered with Google Cloud to offer small businesses advanced cybersecurity and AI capabilities, backed by a $1 billion investment. This initiative aims to strengthen the security and technological capabilities of small enterprises.

item.title: Save 20% Off the Apple AirPods Pro 3, the Best Wireless Earbuds for iPhone
item.description: Apple is offering a 20% discount on its AirPods Pro 3, which feature active noise cancellation and heart rate tracking. This promotion highlights the earbuds' advanced technology and appeal to iPhone users.

item.title: Show HN: Agent Brain Trust, customisable expert panels for AI agents
item.description: Agent Brain Trust introduces customizable expert panels for AI agents, allowing users to gather real expert feedback on various topics. This tool enhances decision-making and product development for AI projects.

item.title: New York developer Richard Cohen snaps up $20M condo at Surf Club Four Seasons
item.description: Developer Richard Cohen has purchased a $20.5 million condo in South Florida, reflecting a trend of wealthy individuals relocating to the area. This move signifies the ongoing migration of wealth to Florida's real estate market.

item.title: 5 tips for using Gemini’s new Notebook feature
item.description: Gemini's new Notebook feature can be enhanced with five practical tips, making it more effective for users. These tips aim to improve user experience and functionality.

item.title: mente added to PyPI
item.description: The mente library has been added to PyPI, introducing a new tool for event-driven reasoning processes. This addition expands the resources available for developers in AI.

item.title: hypernix added to PyPI
item.description: Hypernix has been added to PyPI, allowing users to download and quantize the HyperNix PyTorch model into various formats. This enhances accessibility for developers working with AI models.

item.title: SpaceX says it can buy Cursor later this year for $60 billion or pay $10 billion for 'our work together'
item.description: SpaceX has announced a potential $60 billion acquisition of Cursor or a $10 billion payment for collaborative work. This indicates SpaceX's strategic interests in expanding its technological capabilities.

item.title: Amazon SageMaker AI launches optimized generative AI inference recommendations
item.description: Amazon SageMaker AI has launched optimized generative AI inference recommendations, streamlining the deployment process for users. This new feature enhances performance and reduces manual optimization efforts.

item.title: Jim Cramer says these stocks show why you need to trade on fundamentals, not fear
item.description: Jim Cramer emphasizes the importance of trading based on fundamentals rather than fear, using specific stocks as examples. His insights aim to guide investors towards more rational trading strategies.

item.title: langchain-konstruct 0.2.0
item.description: The langchain-konstruct 0.2.0 release integrates LangChain with Konstruct, a typed knowledge graph for AI agents. This integration enhances the capabilities of AI agents in managing knowledge.
